info4: Hi everyone! I’m really excited to play with you all—let’s have some fun and catch the werewolf together!

info4: Hello. I am Victoria. My role is villager. Have a good game.

info4: Hey folks! It’s Shunichi here. Ready to outsmart our elusive werewolf. Let's treat this as a chess match. No pawns for dinner!

info4: My name is Takumi. I like meat. And my pack.

info4: I have good eyes. I am Seer. Last moon I saw Victoria. She is human.
